description: Repository-wide eslint currently fails with hundreds of pre-existing no-explicit-any and unused-var violations. This blocks the global lint quality gate even when scoped changes are clean. Scope: establish a ratchet strategy or targeted remediation so npm --prefix frontend run lint passes in CI/local.
title: Restore frontend lint gate to green

description: Manual debug on 2026-03-03: conversation panel renders <ConversationView> inside frontend/src/app/page.tsx wrapper class 'flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-hidden bg-muted/20' (line ~235) that is NOT a flex container. ConversationView root uses class 'flex-1 min-h-0 p-4' (frontend/src/components/chat/ConversationView.tsx line ~54), which only works when parent is flex. Because parent is block + overflow-hidden, ScrollArea with h-full expands to content height and internal scroll container is never constrained, so extra messages get clipped and user cannot scroll. Likely introduced in commit b39e8ec when wrapper div was added around ConversationView.
title: Conversation view scroll is clipped by non-flex wrapper

description: Extracted from StartVoiceSessionModule.tsx, RecallScreen.tsx, VoiceRecallService.ts, startSessionFromUrl.ts, writingFlow.ts. 12 invariants. Change: Add file uploads (resume/screenshot) to writer, default recall questions when no URL, per-question voice recall with advancement.
title: TLA+ model: file-upload-recall-questions

description: POST /api/ingestion/url currently maps SESSION_ALREADY_ACTIVE into PIPELINE_INIT_FAILED (500), and AuthAndValidationFilter derives userId from token.substring(0,8). For JWT bearer tokens this commonly becomes user-eyJhbGci for many users, causing cross-user session collisions and persistent active-session conflicts.
title: URL ingestion returns 500 on active session due JWT-derived userId collision

close_reason: Implemented /api/telemetry/new-path-events POST+OPTIONS with schema validation, non-blocking 202 behavior, structured error logging, and route tests including malformed JSON
description:
emitNewPathClientEvent posts interstitial_shown and related events to /api/telemetry/new-path-events, but no matching app route exists in frontend/src/app/api.

In production testing (branch context: new-path-events), telemetry request returns 405 Method Not Allowed for payload {event_name:'interstitial_shown', payload:{...}}.

Code evidence:
- frontend/src/lib/newPathTelemetryClient.ts line 9 sets DEFAULT_ENDPOINT='/api/telemetry/new-path-events'.
- frontend/src/modules/session/interstitial/InterstitialController.tsx emits interstitial_shown.
- No route file exists at frontend/src/app/api/telemetry/new-path-events/route.ts.

Required implementation function(s):
- POST /api/telemetry/new-path-events
- OPTIONS /api/telemetry/new-path-events (preflight-safe browser delivery)

Required behavior:
- Validate event_name + payload via validateNewPathEvent/newPathEventLogger.
- Delegate sink routing through TypedTelemetryGateway.
- Preserve non-blocking telemetry semantics (accepted response even when sink write fails, with structured warning logs).
title: Fix 405 on interstitial new-path telemetry endpoint

close_reason: Implemented live recall progress wiring, helper copy, stop-state controls, incomplete-slot guidance, and move-on intent handling
description:
e2e gap: after stopping recording, anchors/actions/outcomes remain at zero and are not explained; user lacks stop-state controls and cannot reliably issue move-on intents.

Required outcomes:
- Wire live persisted progress into recall UI (remove static zero fallback)
- Add helper copy for anchors/actions/outcomes semantics
- On stop: show re-record, start-over, continue/next-question controls
- Present incomplete prompts/slots in actionable language
- Handle user intents: next question / move on / skip with incomplete-slot guardrails
- Emit telemetry for stop action, move-on intent, and incomplete-slot presentation
title: Recall slot clarity and stop-state controls

description:
Live e2e validation found closure of 340-345 was premature. API/tests landed, but primary /writer journey is missing required wiring and recall UX behaviors.

Confirmed misses:
- /writer starts session directly without URL capture or resume gate
- onboarding/acceleration/linkedin planning modules are not reachable from primary workflow
- recall progress (anchors/actions/outcomes) remains zero in active flow due missing live wiring
- stop-state controls (re-record/start over/incomplete prompts) are missing
- move-on intents (next question / move on / skip) are not handled in active recall flow
- Path 345 telemetry ingest route is missing: client emits to POST /api/telemetry/new-path-events but no corresponding API route exists, causing runtime 405 in new-path-events testing for interstitial_shown payloads.

Track remediation through child issues and plan/spec updates in thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-03-03--07-51--tdd-voice-assisted-session-ui-ux-orchestration-340-345.md and specs/voice-assisted-session-ui-ux.md.
title: Re-open 340-345 UX implementation after e2e validation

description: Extracted from AuthAndValidationFilter.ts, ChannelIngestionPipelineAdapter.ts. 5 invariants, all VIOLATED in buggy mode. Two composing bugs: (1) JWT token.substring(0,8) collapses all users to same userId, defeating user-scoped uniqueness; (2) blanket catch wraps 409 SESSION_ALREADY_ACTIVE into 500 PIPELINE_INIT_FAILED. Spec: specs/orchestration/auth-identity-error-propagation-model.md. TLA+: artifacts/tlaplus/auth-identity-error-propagation-model/. Related: silmari-writer-cme (bug), silmari-writer-b1w (prior model).
title: TLA+ model: auth identity collision + error propagation
